description: Scalable multi-master, multi-slave AXI4 interconnect design. Three AXI4 masters (CPU, DMA, GPU) connect through an AXI4 crossbar/interconnect to four AXI4 slaves (SRAM, DDR Controller, UART, SPI). The interconnect widens the ID field from 4 bits to 6 bits by appending a 2-bit source identifier on the master-side output ports.

testbench.description: Top-level testbench. Declares clk and rst_n and drives them to all DUT instances.

global_signals.name: clk
global_signals.description: System clock. Connects to the BOTTOM port of every instance cube.

global_signals.name: rst_n
global_signals.description: Active-low synchronous reset. Connects to the TOP port of every instance cube.

axi4_master_cpu.description: AXI4 CPU Master. Generates instruction-fetch and data read/write transactions. Acts as the primary system initiator with full burst and cache-line support.

axi4_master_dma.description: AXI4 DMA Engine Master. Performs high-throughput bulk data transfers between memory-mapped peripherals and main memory without CPU intervention. Supports large burst lengths for maximum bus utilization.

axi4_master_gpu.description: AXI4 GPU Master. Issues texture-fetch reads and frame-buffer writes with high bandwidth requirements. Generates wide bursts targeting the DDR controller and SRAM for render-target access.

axi4_interconnect.description: AXI4 Crossbar Interconnect. Routes transactions from 3 slave-side input ports (s0, s1, s2) to 4 master-side output ports (m0, m1, m2, m3) based on address decoding. Appends a 2-bit source identifier to the ID field, widening it from 4 bits (input) to 6 bits (output) so that responses can be routed back to the correct master.

ports.name: s0_awid
ports.description: Slave port 0 write address ID (from CPU)

ports.name: s1_awid
ports.description: Slave port 1 write address ID (from DMA)

ports.name: s2_awid
ports.description: Slave port 2 write address ID (from GPU)

ports.name: m0_awid
ports.description: Master port 0 write address ID (widened, to SRAM)

ports.name: m1_awid
ports.description: Master port 1 write address ID (widened, to DDR)

ports.name: m2_awid
ports.description: Master port 2 write address ID (widened, to UART)

ports.name: m3_awid
ports.description: Master port 3 write address ID (widened, to SPI)

axi4_slave_sram.description: AXI4 SRAM Slave. Provides low-latency, single-cycle access to on-chip SRAM. Serves as tightly coupled memory for the CPU and a fast scratch-pad for the DMA and GPU.

axi4_slave_ddr.description: AXI4 DDR Controller Slave. Interfaces with external DDR SDRAM through a memory controller. Handles refresh scheduling, bank management, and burst reordering to maximize DRAM bandwidth.

axi4_slave_uart.description: AXI4 UART Peripheral Slave. Memory-mapped UART transmitter/receiver. Supports programmed-I/O register access for baud-rate configuration, TX/RX data, and status/interrupt registers.

axi4_slave_spi.description: AXI4 SPI Peripheral Slave. Memory-mapped SPI controller supporting master-mode serial communication. Provides register-based access for clock divider, chip-select, TX/RX FIFOs, and transfer control.

instances.description: CPU master instance – primary system initiator
DMA engine master instance – bulk data mover
AXI4 crossbar interconnect – 3-to-4 address-decoded switch fabric

connections.description: System clock from testbench to all 8 instances (enters at BOTTOM of each cube)
Active-low reset from testbench to all 8 instances (enters at TOP of each cube)

connections.label: AXI4 CPU→XBAR_S0
connections.description: AXI4 bus from CPU master to interconnect slave port 0

connections.label: AXI4 DMA→XBAR_S1
connections.description: AXI4 bus from DMA engine master to interconnect slave port 1

connections.label: AXI4 GPU→XBAR_S2
connections.description: AXI4 bus from GPU master to interconnect slave port 2

connections.label: AXI4 XBAR_M0→SRAM
connections.description: AXI4 bus from interconnect master port 0 to SRAM slave (widened 6-bit ID)

connections.label: AXI4 XBAR_M1→DDR
connections.description: AXI4 bus from interconnect master port 1 to DDR controller slave (widened 6-bit ID)

connections.label: AXI4 XBAR_M2→UART
connections.description: AXI4 bus from interconnect master port 2 to UART peripheral slave (widened 6-bit ID)

connections.label: AXI4 XBAR_M3→SPI
connections.description: AXI4 bus from interconnect master port 3 to SPI peripheral slave (widened 6-bit ID)
